content.text:
{"success":true,"response":"The process for `process_rule_id 'J09A'` has been executed end-to-end:

- All rules were applied to create and update `J09A_temp` (including ENTSCHEIDUNG logic and city/house-number rules).
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Sales vs. net data precedence was applied (sales data preferred where available).
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set to `MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with machine estimations in both 2023 and 2024.
- Two CSVs were generated:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (666 rows) – mandatory readings only.
  - `J09A.csv` (20,200 rows) – all other entries.
- The files were sent:
  - To `mandatory.reading@provider.com` with the mandatory readings.
  - To `meter.readings@evu.com` for the remaining readings.
- All temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_step4`, `J09A_step5`, `J09A_step6`) were dropped.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
The process for `process_rule_id 'J09A'` has been executed end-to-end:

- All rules were applied to create and update `J09A_temp` (including ENTSCHEIDUNG logic and city/house-number rules).
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Sales vs. net data precedence was applied (sales data preferred where available).
- `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was set to `MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with machine estimations in both 2023 and 2024.
- Two CSVs were generated:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (666 rows) – mandatory readings only.
  - `J09A.csv` (20,200 rows) – all other entries.
- The files were sent:
  - To `mandatory.reading@provider.com` with the mandatory readings.
  - To `meter.readings@evu.com` for the remaining readings.
- All temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_step4`, `J09A_step5`, `J09A_step6`) were dropped.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id 'J09A'` has been executed successfully. Summary of what was done:

- Applied all defined rules and created/updated the temporary tables (`J09A_temp`, `J09A_step4`, `J09A_step5`, `J09A_step6`).
- Joined data with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`.
- Applied precedence so that sales data overrides net data where available.
- Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = MANDATORY_READING` for EQUNR with machine estimations in both 2023 and 2024.
- Generated two CSV files:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 666 rows (mandatory readings).
  - `J09A.csv` with 20,200 rows (all other entries).
- Sent:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09A.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all intermediate temporary tables.

If you want, I can:
- Re-run `J09A` with modified conditions (e.g., different mandatory-reading logic or years).
- Generate or register a new process rule based on a natural-language description or BPMN file.
